name: Baked Cheddar Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the olives and pat them dry with towels.
2. Combine the grated Cheddar cheese and softened butter in a bowl.
3. Add flour and Cayenne pepper to the mixture and blend until well combined.
4. Form small balls of dough (about 1 tablespoon each) and wrap or mold each piece around an olive, ensuring it is completely covered.
5. Place the wrapped olives on a baking sheet lined with wax paper.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Serve warm. Makes 24 olives. A favorite from 1969 Gourmet Magazine.
